disclosure: Sourced from Google Business Profile public documentation and third-party reporting

claims.text: Google Business Profile has a chat/messaging feature that is not enabled by default
Businesses must reply within 24 hours or Google can automatically disable chat
Owners can set an automated welcome message that fires when a chat starts

disclosure: Response time statistics reflect widely cited industry research on lead follow-up speed, not an internally measured Black Arrow metric.

claims.text: Industry research indicates answering a hot lead within 5 minutes can roughly double close rates
Only 17% of service businesses respond to new leads within an hour
Hot/Warm/Cold lead triage framework and matching response protocols

disclosure: Carrier enforcement timeline described in general terms (2025) rather than a specific month, since exact rollout dates and enforcement intensity vary by carrier.

claims.text: Major U.S. carriers block unregistered A2P 10DLC business SMS entirely as of 2025, with no error shown to the sender
Registration requires brand and campaign approval through The Campaign Registry (TCR)
Missed-call text-backs, appointment reminders, and review requests are automated business SMS subject to this rule
